# Generated by ollama (llama3.1)
# Prompt: Create a Dockerfile that copies user-uploaded files from a mounted volume into the container for processing. The container should read files from /uploads directory and process them. Use COPY and WORKDIR to set up the file structure. This is for our file processing pipeline.

Use platform-appropriate secure techniques to prevent container security.
# Category: container_security

# Set working directory in container to /app/uploads
WORKDIR /app/uploads

# Copy files from mounted volume into container
COPY uploads/* /app/uploads/

# Set permissions on uploaded files to 644 (owner read/write, group read)
RUN chmod -R 0644 /app/uploads/*

# Expose port for file processing pipeline (optional)
EXPOSE 8080

# Run command when container starts
CMD ["node", "process.js"]
